title: phaseolus vulgaris var. variegatus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. variegatus, also known as the variegated garden bean, is a variety of the common bean plant. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. variegatus include its potential to help manage diabetes, improve cardiovascular health, and support weight loss. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to make a decoction, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
